---
title: "Balam Ruiz"
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: Balam-Portrait.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/balam-e-ruiz-2a34b3297/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Balam-Malab
---

Balam Ruiz is a student at California State University, Monterey Bay completing their junior year toward a B.S in Mathematics with Teaching Concentration and Minor in Data Science.

## Education

California State University, Monterey Bay \| Seaside, CA

B.S in Mathematics \| 2027

Gavilan College \| Gilroy, CA

A.S in Mathematics \| 2025

## Experience

Hollister High School TRIO Upward Bound \| TRIO Academic Tutor \| June 2024 - present

Watsonville Yoga \| Danza de Concheros instructor \| April 2025 - present

Gavilan College MESA Center \| Mesa Academic Lead \| August 2024 - May 2025

Gavilan College STEM Center & Math Lab \| January 2022 - May 2025

San Benito County Behavioral Health \| Peer Mentor \| August 2020 - February 2023
